---
title: "Expressions (CEL)"
---

Use CEL in task `when` clauses and run-expression nodes.

## Built-ins

- `branch()`
- `env("NAME")`
- `profile()`
- `tag()`
- `param("name")`
- `has_param("name")`
- `file_exists("path")`
- `os`

## Examples

```yaml
tasks:
  deploy:
    desc: Deploy only from main
    cmd: ./scripts/deploy.sh
    when: branch() == "main" && profile() == "prod"
```

```yaml
when: os == "darwin"
```
